programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: After a father takes police on a high-speed chase with his toddler on board, K9 Keanu is deployed into a volatile standoff and every second counts. K9 Kyro tracks down the critical piece of evidence: a gun tossed by a fleeing suspect. K9 Lupo pushes through dense, punishing brush, getting tangled under low branches but refuses to quit, fighting through to make the apprehension. Meanwhile, after saving his handler's life, K9 Taco becomes more than a partner.

programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programs.title: Southern Law
programs.desc: A Corporal in Pasco County ends up with a bloody cut on his head after subduing an aggressive suspect. Stop sticks, a K9 unit and a PIT maneuver are all deployed by police in Tulsa to stop a fleeing suspect in an allegedly stolen vehicle. Officers in Walton County find 3 pairs of women's underwear and a used condom when they search a suspect accused of assault with a vehicle.

programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.
